---
title: Agent Harness, Tools & Runtime
module_id: module-18
phase: Build
---
Build the runtime layer that turns an LLM into a reliable agent — loops, tools, permissions, MCP, and observability.
| | |
|---|---|
| **Module ID** | `module-18` |
| **Phase** | Build |
| **Lessons** | 6 |
| **Est. hours** | ~4h |
## Lessons
| # | Lesson | Duration | Level |
|---|--------|----------|-------|
| 1 | [What Is an Agent Harness?](lessons/01-what-is-an-agent-harness.md) | 40 min | intermediate |
| 2 | [Agent Loop and State](lessons/02-agent-loop-and-state.md) | 45 min | advanced |
| 3 | [Tools and Function Calling](lessons/03-tools-and-function-calling.md) | 40 min | advanced |
| 4 | [MCP — Model Context Protocol](lessons/04-mcp-model-context-protocol.md) | 40 min | intermediate |
| 5 | [Permissions and Safety in the Harness](lessons/05-permissions-and-safety-in-the-harness.md) | 35 min | advanced |
| 6 | [Observability in the Harness](lessons/06-observability-in-the-harness.md) | 40 min | advanced |

**Prerequisites:** [M11 · AI Agents Fundamentals](../module-11-ai-agents-fundamentals/index.md) (especially Lessons 1–4 on the agent loop, ReAct, and tool use).

**Start here:** [What Is an Agent Harness?](lessons/01-what-is-an-agent-harness.md)
